evals.name: commit-message-format
evals.prompt: I just added a new search-by-date feature to the booking module in om-newblink-bl-service. The files changed are src/booking/search-by-date.use-case.ts and src/booking/search-by-date.use-case.spec.ts. This is for BMAD story 2-4-booking-search. Write the git commit command for me.
evals.expected_output: A git commit command with: conventional commit format (feat(booking): ...), imperative mood, lowercase description, no period, story reference in body/footer, NO Co-Authored-By trailer

assertions.text: Uses feat: or feat(booking): type prefix
Description uses imperative mood and starts lowercase
Description does not end with a period
Includes Story: 2-4-booking-search in body or footer
Does NOT contain Co-Authored-By
Adds specific files, not git add . or git add -A

evals.name: breaking-change-commit
evals.prompt: We need to commit a breaking change in om-blk-auth-service. We removed the old /api/v1/auth/login endpoint and replaced it with OAuth2 flow at /api/v2/auth/login. Files changed: src/auth/login.controller.ts, src/auth/login.service.ts, src/auth/dto/login.dto.ts. Story 3-1-auth-migration. Write the commit command.
evals.expected_output: A commit with breaking change indicator (! or BREAKING CHANGE footer), major bump implications, migration details in footer, NO Co-Authored-By

assertions.text: Contains ! before colon OR BREAKING CHANGE footer
Includes BREAKING CHANGE: footer with migration details
Uses feat or refactor type
Does NOT contain Co-Authored-By
References story 3-1-auth-migration

evals.name: non-releasable-commit-types
evals.prompt: I need to commit three separate changes across services: 1) Added unit tests for the scheduler cron parser in om-blk-scheduler-service (src/scheduler/cron-parser.spec.ts), 2) Updated the CI workflow in om-newblink-github-workflow (.github/workflows/ci.yml), 3) Refactored the booking date utility in om-newblink-bl-service without changing behavior (src/booking/date.util.ts). Write all three commit commands.
evals.expected_output: Three separate commits using test:, ci:, and refactor: types respectively. None should use feat: or fix:. No Co-Authored-By on any.

assertions.text: Uses test: or test(scheduler): for the test commit
Uses ci: for the CI workflow commit
Uses refactor: or refactor(booking): for the refactor commit
Does NOT use feat: or fix: for any of these
Does NOT contain Co-Authored-By in any commit
Each commit is in the correct service directory

evals.name: parent-submodule-pointer-update
evals.prompt: Story 1-2-user-authentication PRs have been merged in om-blk-auth-service and om-newblink-blink-bff-service. Now I need to update the parent repo's submodule pointers. What are the exact commands?
evals.expected_output: Commands to checkout default branches, pull, then commit in parent with chore: type, listing updated services. No Co-Authored-By.

assertions.text: Uses chore: type for parent repo commit
Lists both services in commit body
Does NOT contain Co-Authored-By
Checks out default branch and pulls for each service before updating parent
Uses git add with specific service paths, not git add -A

evals.name: dependency-update-commit
evals.prompt: I upgraded @nestjs/core from v10 to v11 in om-blk-auth-service. The package.json and package-lock.json changed. Write the commit.
evals.expected_output: A commit using deps: type (not chore: or build:), which is a releasable unit triggering a patch bump. No Co-Authored-By.

assertions.text: Uses deps: type prefix
Does NOT use chore: or build: for this dependency update
Does NOT contain Co-Authored-By
Mentions the specific package and version in description
